name: 13" Fabric Bin 6pk Natural - Brightroom™
description:
Lend a touch of modern style to your home decor with the 6-Pack of Fabric Bins from Brightroom™. The bins in this pack of six are designed in a cube shape with an open top for easy organization. Made of fabric, this natural-shade bin pack comes with cutout handles to make them easy to pull out. Place them on any tabletop or shelf or tuck them into a closet for space-saving storage.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
